# Data Source (hush_gcp_sa_access_privilege)

Use this data source to retrieve information about a GCP SA access privilege in the Hush Security platform.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "hush_gcp_sa_access_privilege" "example" {
  id = "apr-eu12345678"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the GCP SA access privilege

### Read-Only

- `name` (String) The name of the GCP SA access privilege
- `description` (String) The description of the GCP SA access privilege
- `project_id` (String) The GCP project ID
- `sa_email` (String) The service account email
- `sa_config` (List of Object) The service account configuration (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--sa_config))
- `type` (String) The type of access privilege

<a id="nestedatt--sa_config"></a>
### Nested Schema for `sa_config`

Read-Only:

- `display_name` (String)
- `roles` (List of String)
